name: starting-strength
description: Mark Rippetoe's 'Starting Strength: Basic Barbell Training' — the definitive guide to barbell training, teaching the five fundamental lifts and linear progression for getting stronger.
useCase: Learn proper barbell technique, start a strength training program, fix form issues, and understand how to get stronger consistently.
knownRisks: Requires access to a barbell, squat rack, and bumper plates — may not suit home gyms
Strong opinions about technique — other reputable coaches may disagree
Not a substitute for in-person coaching — form errors are hard to self-diagnose
